text: Natural language processing, or NLP, is a branch of artificial intelligence that helps computers understand and work with human language. It focuses on text understanding, allowing machines to grasp meaning from written words. One common use is machine translation, where systems like Google Translate convert text from one language to another. Another application is sentiment analysis, which determines whether a piece of writing expresses positive, negative, or neutral emotions. You also encounter NLP in daily life through chatbots, which use this technology to answer questions and assist with tasks. Overall, NLP makes communication between humans and technology smoother and more efficient.
